typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` mission lifecycle section to reflect canonical daemon mission status enum values and clarify that planning/reconciling labels are runtime phases, not persisted mission statuses.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify extension-worker validation guidance for scrutiny-driven parity fixes so required command coverage distinguishes full milestone checks from focused fix-validation checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for m4-extension-parity-ordering-and-lifecycle-enums observed command-scope ambiguity between SKILL.md's broad required unit-test command and the narrowly targeted parity-fix verification run set used by the worker.
